title: Russian sanctions against Ukraine - Wikipedia
body: Some of this article's listed sources may not be reliable . Please help improve this article by looking for better, more reliable sources. Unreliable citations may be challenged and removed. ( May 2022 ) ( Learn how and when to remove this message ) Russian sanctions against Ukraine were put into effect by the November 1, 2018, Order of the Government of Russia No. 1300 [ 1 ] in pursuance of the October 22, 2018 Decree of the President of Russia No. 592. [ 2 ] The decree imposed economic sanctions on 322 Ukrainian citizens and 68 Ukrainian companies. The sanctions affect only the assets of the listed persons and companies within the territory of Russia.
